channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rep. John Rose to Newsmax: Pass DHS Bill Before Trump Measures Expire
item.description: House Republicans need to get the Department of Homeland Security funding bill "across the finish line" before emergency steps taken by President Dona...

item.title: Morning Minute: 'But I Play One on TV...'
PAC Targets Republicans Over Immigration Bill
item.description: House Republicans are facing a fresh challenge in the 2026 midterms: the Homeland Political Action Committee, a new conservative super PAC targeting R...

item.title: Over a dozen Dems demand Trump admin protect Iranians living in the US
item.description: Democrats signed a letter urging the Trump administration to shield Iranians in the U.S. who cannot safely return to the Middle Eastern nation.

item.title: Ilhan Omar’s Apple Cider Vinegar Attacker Flips Plea in Deal With the Feds
